name: pagerepo
description: A concurrency-safe, generic in-memory repository of records. Query(filter, sortLess, page, size) filters records (nil filter keeps all), stably sorts them (nil sortLess preserves insertion order), and returns a fresh-copy, 1-based page. Standard library only, generics, gofmt-clean, go 1.23. Verified GREEN: go build, go vet, go test, and go test -race all pass at /tmp/wf2-go-11-base.

maintain.request: Pages in the UI need a pager control like 'showing 11-20 of 57', but Query only returns the slice of records for one page with no way to know the total number of matches or how many pages exist. Add a QueryPage method (and a Page[R] result type) that selects Items exactly like Query but additionally reports pagination metadata: Total (number of records matching the filter) and TotalPages (pages of the given size needed to hold them), echoing back the requested Page and Size. Refactor the shared filter/sort/slice logic so existing Query behavior is unchanged.

review.bug: Add appends to the shared items slice without acquiring r.mu, so concurrent Add calls (and Add racing with Query/Len) form an unsynchronized data race that can lose writes, corrupt the slice header, or panic.
keywords: concurrent append to shared items slice
